features.name: case statement with wire expression as case pattern
features.description: Code should include a case statement where case item patterns are wire or signal expressions (non-constant), not integer literals, matching IEEE 1800-2017 §12.5.2 constant expression case items

features.name: case statement with default clause and expression patterns
features.description: Code should include a case statement that mixes expression-based case patterns with a default clause, where the expressions are runtime signal values

features.name: initial block using $fwrite inside case arms with expression patterns
features.description: Code should include an initial block with a case statement that uses wire expressions as case patterns and calls $fwrite in each arm
